blockers.description: The official text names Waffle while the hardware-assembly CAD label names Waffle Pi.
Hardware, controller, LiDAR, compute, firmware, operating-system patch, and package revisions are not frozen.
Mounting hardware, harnesses, power elements, and documented alternates are not closed.
Required power, connector, performance, thermal, safety, and lifecycle dimensions remain unverified or require engineering review.
RobbottX has not inspected or physically tested the exact configuration.
No public 3D asset has approved rights, revision binding, coordinate metadata, checksum, validation, and static fallback.
Authorized offers, regions, price, stock, lead time, warranty, shipping, taxes, and relationships are not frozen.
The target canonical service and checksum object-storage hosting path is not yet selected.

compatibility.basis: The compatibility sentence names Waffle while the assembly CAD label names Waffle Pi; exact revisions, fasteners, and stability inputs are not frozen.
compatibility.conditions: Do not treat visual fit or generic family naming as engineering confirmation.
compatibility.label: Mechanical + geometry

compatibility.basis: The arm is specified at 12 V, but the complete system power budget, protection, connectors, cable limits, and transient behavior are not closed.
compatibility.conditions: Requires exact revisions and a reviewed power budget.
compatibility.label: Electrical + power

compatibility.basis: No reviewed connector and pinout matrix is present in this candidate.
compatibility.conditions: Requires exact harness and interface documentation.
compatibility.label: Connector + pinout

compatibility.basis: The manufacturer specifies a TTL multidrop bus and OpenCR as a controller option.
compatibility.conditions: Device IDs, baud, connector, firmware, and topology must be frozen.
compatibility.label: Protocol + communications

compatibility.basis: The instructions were tested on Ubuntu 22.04 and ROS 2 Humble, and current official repository releases are recorded.
compatibility.conditions: Package commits, firmware, OS patch, dependencies, and configuration must be frozen and reproduced.
compatibility.label: Firmware + software + licensing

compatibility.basis: Arm specifications exist, but integrated reach, payload, base stability, duty cycle, latency, and task envelope are not evaluated.
compatibility.conditions: Requires calculations, simulation, and declared physical-test status.
compatibility.label: Performance + timing

compatibility.basis: No complete configuration environmental envelope is recorded.
compatibility.conditions: Indoor research purpose is descriptive, not a rated limit.
compatibility.label: Thermal + environmental

compatibility.basis: No system risk assessment, protective function, emergency stop, certification scope, or intended-user boundary is approved.
compatibility.conditions: No safety-rated, medical, industrial-production, or autonomous public-space claim.
compatibility.label: Safety + regulatory

compatibility.basis: No authorized seller, exact SKU, region, stock, lifecycle, warranty, or lead-time snapshot is frozen.
compatibility.conditions: Commercial information must remain separate from canonical identity.
compatibility.label: Lifecycle + supply + region

compatibility.basis: This first candidate has no off-Earth qualification or mission claim.
compatibility.conditions: Future planetary profiles require separate radiation, vacuum/atmosphere, dust, thermal, autonomy, communications-delay, repairability, and contamination evidence.
compatibility.label: Mission + planetary environment

disclosures: Manufacturer-published facts are not RobbottX physical test results.
No price, stock, certification, safety rating, or planetary qualification is claimed.
The retired catalog CSV and image collection were not used.

sources.locator: Manipulation > TurtleBot3 with OpenMANIPULATOR; Hardware Assembly; ROS 2 note
Features > Hardware Specification table > Waffle Pi

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer hardware specification; exact product revision not frozen.
specifications.label: Arm input voltage

specifications.conditions: Includes one gripper degree of freedom.
specifications.label: Arm degrees of freedom

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer specification; orientation, reach, acceleration, duty cycle, and safety factor are not stated in the table.
specifications.label: Arm payload (manufacturer claim)

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer specification; test method and operating conditions are not stated in the table.
specifications.label: Arm repeatability (manufacturer claim)

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer summary specification. The inertia section separately states 711.37 g; this candidate does not silently merge the two values.
specifications.label: Arm summary mass

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer summary specification; reference frame is not stated in the table.
specifications.label: Arm reach

specifications.conditions: Waffle Pi row in the manufacturer hardware specification.
specifications.label: Base envelope

specifications.conditions: Manufacturer documentation says the instructions were tested on this baseline; exact package, firmware, and patch versions are not frozen.
specifications.label: Documented test baseline

payload.summary: An evidence-backed research preview of a TurtleBot3 Waffle Pi base with an OpenMANIPULATOR-X. Manufacturer documentation supports the relationship, but exact revision applicability and multiple engineering dimensions remain open.
